description: 最常用的并列连词。连接同类词或句子。
examples_json: [{"en":"I like reading and listening to music.","zh":"我喜欢阅读和听音乐。"}]

description: 表示转折。连接两个相反或对比的观点。
examples_json: [{"en":"I was tired but I kept working.","zh":"我很累但继续工作。"}]

description: 比but更正式。用于句首或句中，用逗号隔开。
examples_json: [{"en":"The weather was bad. However we still went out.","zh":"天气很糟，然而我们还是出去了。"}]

description: 用于对比两个不同的事实。
examples_json: [{"en":"My sister is outgoing whereas I am shy.","zh":"我姐姐外向而我内向。"}]
[{"en":"I stayed home because I was sick.","zh":"我待在家里因为我病了。"}]

description: 正式因果连接词。用句号或分号与前句隔开。
examples_json: [{"en":"He didn't study. Therefore he failed the exam.","zh":"他没学习，所以考试没通过。"}]

description: 引导让步从句。although + 从句 + 主句。
examples_json: [{"en":"Although it rained we had a great time.","zh":"虽然下雨了但我们玩得很开心。"}]

description: 后接名词或动名词。despite the rain / despite being tired。
examples_json: [{"en":"We went out despite the heavy rain.","zh":"尽管下着大雨我们还是出去了。"}]

description: 引导时间从句。when + 从句表示"当...的时候"。
examples_json: [{"en":"When I arrived they were having dinner.","zh":"我到达时他们正在吃晚饭。"}]

description: 引导条件从句。if + 从句 + 主句。
examples_json: [{"en":"If it rains I will stay home.","zh":"如果下雨我就待在家里。"}]

description: 引导定语从句修饰人。who + 动词。
examples_json: [{"en":"The girl who sits next to me is very kind.","zh":"坐我旁边的女孩很善良。"}]

description: 引导定语从句修饰物或动物。
examples_json: [{"en":"The book which I borrowed was fascinating.","zh":"我借的那本书很吸引人。"}]
